DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/scim/v2/Gr.description: Deletes a SCIM Group (custom user groups only). System groups backed by Cloudflare permission groups cannot be deleted via SCIM. Returns 204 No Content on success.

schema.description: Account identifier tag.
schema.title: Account Identifier

schema.description: The group identifier for a SCIM Group resource. For system groups this is prefixed `cloudflare-v1-<permissionGroupTag>`; for custom user groups this is a UUID-style tag.
schema.title: SCIM Group Identifier

schema.description: SCIM error envelope (RFC 7644 Section 3.12). Returned on all 4XX and 5XX responses from SCIM endpoints.

detail.description: A human-readable message describing the error.
detail.example: Invalid SCIM request: userName is required

scimType.description: A SCIM detail error keyword (RFC 7644 Section 3.12). Only present for specific error conditions (e.g. `uniqueness` for duplicate member).

status.description: The HTTP status code as a string.

schema.title: SCIM Error Response

GET /accounts/{account_id}/scim/v2/Group.description: Lists SCIM Group resources for the account. Returns both system groups (backed by Cloudflare permission groups, prefixed `cloudflare-v1-`) and custom user groups. Supports filtering by `displayName` using SCIM filter syntax.

schema.description: Account identifier tag.
schema.title: Account Identifier

schema.description: The 1-based index of the first result in the current set of list results. Values less than 1 are treated as 1.
Specifies the desired maximum number of query results per page.
SCIM filter expression (RFC 7644 Section 3.4.2.2). Only `displayName eq "value"` is supported.
SCIM ListResponse envelope for Group resources (RFC 7644 Section 3.4.2).

items.description: A SCIM 2.0 Group resource as returned in list responses. Does not include members; use the individual GET endpoint to retrieve members.

displayName.description: A human-readable name for the Group.

externalId.description: Identifier for the Group as defined by the provisioning client (IdP).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Group, assigned by Cloudflare. System groups are prefixed `cloudflare-v1-<permissionGroupTag>`; custom groups use a UUID-style tag.

meta.description: Resource metadata for a SCIM Group.

resourceType.description: The name of the resource type.

meta.title: SCIM Group Meta

items.title: SCIM Group Summary

itemsPerPage.description: The number of resources returned in this page.

startIndex.description: The 1-based index of the first result in this set.

totalResults.description: The total number of results matching the query.

schema.title: SCIM Group List Response

schema.description: SCIM error envelope (RFC 7644 Section 3.12). Returned on all 4XX and 5XX responses from SCIM endpoints.

detail.description: A human-readable message describing the error.
detail.example: Invalid SCIM request: userName is required

scimType.description: A SCIM detail error keyword (RFC 7644 Section 3.12). Only present for specific error conditions (e.g. `uniqueness` for duplicate member).

status.description: The HTTP status code as a string.

schema.title: SCIM Error Response

GET /accounts/{account_id}/scim/v2/Group.description: Retrieves a single SCIM Group resource by group ID.

schema.description: Account identifier tag.
schema.title: Account Identifier

schema.description: The group identifier for a SCIM Group resource. For system groups this is prefixed `cloudflare-v1-<permissionGroupTag>`; for custom user groups this is a UUID-style tag.
schema.title: SCIM Group Identifier

schema.description: A SCIM 2.0 Group resource representing an account user group (RFC 7643 Section 4.2). May be a system group (backed by a Cloudflare permission group, read-only except for member management) or a custom user group (full CRUD).

displayName.description: A human-readable name for the Group.

externalId.description: Identifier for the Group as defined by the provisioning client (IdP).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Group, assigned by Cloudflare. System groups are prefixed `cloudflare-v1-<permissionGroupTag>`; custom groups use a UUID-style tag.

members.description: A list of members of the Group. Only populated for custom (Phase 2) groups on individual GET requests. Each member object contains a `value` (user tag) and optional `display` (email).

display.description: The display name (email) of the group member.

value.description: The user tag identifier of the group member.

meta.description: Resource metadata for a SCIM Group.

resourceType.description: The name of the resource type.

meta.title: SCIM Group Meta

schema.title: SCIM Group

schema.description: SCIM error envelope (RFC 7644 Section 3.12). Returned on all 4XX and 5XX responses from SCIM endpoints.

detail.description: A human-readable message describing the error.
detail.example: Invalid SCIM request: userName is required

scimType.description: A SCIM detail error keyword (RFC 7644 Section 3.12). Only present for specific error conditions (e.g. `uniqueness` for duplicate member).

status.description: The HTTP status code as a string.

schema.title: SCIM Error Response

PATCH /accounts/{account_id}/scim/v2/Gro.description: Partially updates a SCIM Group via PATCH operations (RFC 7644 Section 3.5.2). Supports add, remove, and replace operations on `members`, `displayName`, and `externalId`. For system groups (prefixed `cloudflare-v1-`), only member management operations are supported.

schema.description: Account identifier tag.
schema.title: Account Identifier

schema.description: The group identifier for a SCIM Group resource. For system groups this is prefixed `cloudflare-v1-<permissionGroupTag>`; for custom user groups this is a UUID-style tag.
schema.title: SCIM Group Identifier

schema.description: Request body for a SCIM PATCH operation on a Group resource (RFC 7644 Section 3.5.2).

Operations.description: List of PATCH operations to apply.

items.description: A single PATCH operation for a Group resource. Supports `add`, `remove`, and `replace` on `members`, `displayName`, and `externalId`.

path.description: Attribute path targeted by this operation. Use `members` to modify group membership. May also include a filter expression to target specific members, e.g. `members[value eq "userTag"]`.

value.description: The value(s) for the operation. For member add/replace operations, an array of member value objects. For `displayName` or `externalId` updates, a string value.

items.description: A member value object used in Group PATCH operations.

value.description: The user tag of the member to add or remove.

items.title: SCIM Group Patch Member Value
SCIM Group Patch Operation

schema.title: SCIM PatchOp Request (Groups)

schema.description: A SCIM 2.0 Group resource representing an account user group (RFC 7643 Section 4.2). May be a system group (backed by a Cloudflare permission group, read-only except for member management) or a custom user group (full CRUD).

displayName.description: A human-readable name for the Group.

externalId.description: Identifier for the Group as defined by the provisioning client (IdP).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Group, assigned by Cloudflare. System groups are prefixed `cloudflare-v1-<permissionGroupTag>`; custom groups use a UUID-style tag.

members.description: A list of members of the Group. Only populated for custom (Phase 2) groups on individual GET requests. Each member object contains a `value` (user tag) and optional `display` (email).

display.description: The display name (email) of the group member.

value.description: The user tag identifier of the group member.

meta.description: Resource metadata for a SCIM Group.

resourceType.description: The name of the resource type.

meta.title: SCIM Group Meta

schema.title: SCIM Group

schema.description: SCIM error envelope (RFC 7644 Section 3.12). Returned on all 4XX and 5XX responses from SCIM endpoints.

detail.description: A human-readable message describing the error.
detail.example: Invalid SCIM request: userName is required

scimType.description: A SCIM detail error keyword (RFC 7644 Section 3.12). Only present for specific error conditions (e.g. `uniqueness` for duplicate member).

POST /accounts/{account_id}/scim/v2/Grou.description: Creates a new SCIM Group (user group) for the account. The `displayName` must not be empty and must not begin with `CF` (reserved for system groups).

schema.description: Account identifier tag.
schema.title: Account Identifier

schema.description: Request body for creating a SCIM Group. The `displayName` must not be empty and must not begin with `CF` (reserved for system groups).

displayName.description: A human-readable name for the Group. REQUIRED. Must not start with `CF` (reserved prefix for Cloudflare-managed virtual groups).

externalId.description: Identifier for the Group as defined by the provisioning client (IdP).

schema.title: SCIM Group Create Request

schema.description: A SCIM 2.0 Group resource representing an account user group (RFC 7643 Section 4.2). May be a system group (backed by a Cloudflare permission group, read-only except for member management) or a custom user group (full CRUD).

displayName.description: A human-readable name for the Group.

externalId.description: Identifier for the Group as defined by the provisioning client (IdP).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Group, assigned by Cloudflare. System groups are prefixed `cloudflare-v1-<permissionGroupTag>`; custom groups use a UUID-style tag.

members.description: A list of members of the Group. Only populated for custom (Phase 2) groups on individual GET requests. Each member object contains a `value` (user tag) and optional `display` (email).

display.description: The display name (email) of the group member.

value.description: The user tag identifier of the group member.

meta.description: Resource metadata for a SCIM Group.

resourceType.description: The name of the resource type.
